title: peepopt.muldiv: unsound optimization (not enough checking).
body:
The muldiv pattern doesn't take signedness into account, resulting in mis-optimization:

```
$ cat t.v
module t(input [3:0] A, input [3:0] B, output signed [3:0] Y);

wire [7:0] P = A * B;
wire signed [7:0] SP = P;
wire signed [3:0] SB = B;
assign Y = SP / SB;

endmodule
$ yosys t.v -p 'eval -set A 7 -set B 10'
[...]
Eval result: \Y = 4'0101.
[...]
$ yosys t.v -p 'peepopt; eval -set A 7 -set B 10'
[...]
Eval result: \Y = 4'0111.
[...]
```
